caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark vest with red and blue embroidery, and a red and white necklace, stands before a microphone and plays an acoustic guitar. He is positioned in front of a wall with light-colored horizontal blinds. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including individuals with brown and white hair, as they watch the performer. The word "ORCA" appears as a white logo in the lower right area of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in place, singing into the microphone and strumming his guitar, while the viewers in the foreground remain stationary. The lighting and setting stay consistent throughout the frames as the man continues his performance.
